step.name: pick-library-and-config
step.action: Install + configure (structlog/zap/slog/winston) with JSON renderer + processors. Set service field once.

step.name: wire-correlation-middleware
step.action: Add middleware that reads/generates correlation_id and binds to logger context. Verify child contexts (Celery tasks, workers) inherit.

step.name: build-redaction-pipeline
step.action: Build a single processor/formatter that masks listed fields recursively. Add unit tests for nested payloads.
step.decision-gate: If a payload structure cannot be redacted recursively (binary blob), exempt it from logging entirely.

step.name: audit-log-levels
step.action: Walk each call. Reclassify per the contract: error/warn/info/debug. Remove duplicate logs (event logged at multiple layers).

step.name: ship-to-aggregator
step.action: Configure aggregator transport (HTTP, syslog, file scraper). Verify index schema matches JSON keys. Smoke test queries.
